sub_text: A helper bot for GKProduction Discord servers.
card1_list1: Every month the bot publishes the top best works.
card1_list2: Posts are collected from different channels/forums and ranked by positive reactions (unique number of people who left positive reactions is counted).
card2_list1: Automatic creation of threads under messages in media channels for your comments or discussions.
card3_list2: Open the message context menu via RMB or long press, then select "Apps -> 🌐 Translate / Перевод", you will receive a translation of the message into your language.
card4_list1: The bot writes a random phrase in its status.
card5_list1: The bot reacts to pings with funny and energetic GIFs.
footer_title: The bot's functionality can be updated over time.
